title: Mayoral Renewables Fund: application guidance for Mayoral Strategic Authorities (closed to applications)
body: " Applications for the Mayoral Renewables Fund are now closed.   The £10 million Mayoral Renewables Fund provides Mayoral Strategic Authorities (MSAs) with funding to deliver priority renewable energy generation projects in their own estate.  The Mayoral Renewables Fund supports:    clean power deployment through renewable energy generation projects  empowerment of local government to work with GBE to identify and address opportunities to meet national objectives on clean power   This forms part of the Great British Energy (GBE) Local Power Plan, aimed at enhancing energy security, reducing carbon emissions, and generating renewable energy in communities across the UK.  Eligibility  All MSAs were eligible to apply for funding. Full detail on the eligibility criteria can be found in the scheme guidance.  The full list of eligible authorities:   West Yorkshire Greater Manchester North-East York and North Yorkshire Tees Valley Liverpool City Region West Midlands East Midlands South Yorkshire Greater London Authority Cambridgeshire and Peterborough West of England Greater Lincolnshire Hull and East Yorkshire   Timescales  The timescale for applications is as follows:     Milestone Date     Application and window opens 21 March 2025   Application window closes 29 April 2025   Successful applicants informed and announced 16 May 2025   Project end date 31 March 2026     The funding period for this grant will be financial year 2025 to 2026. The project deliverables must be submitted to the department by 31 March 2026.  Contact   For any enquiries, email mayoralrenewablesfund@energysecurity.gov.uk.   "
